title: Grida Neo Bharat
description: EV servicing and accessories platform offering repair, battery sales with customer plans, admin-partner coordination and automated invoicing.

title: E-commerce Platform
description: Inspired by Flipkart/Amazon, the project lets one seller manage electronics and customers order via COD or online.

title: TEN AI
description: An AI-powered platform where users can interact with multiple AI agents via chat and voice calls to get informative, real-time answers to their queries and problems.

title: Edtech Perception
description: A full-stack EdTech platform where instructors upload courses, students purchase and enroll, and an admin manages users, payments, and course content.
